arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta delivers fitness update on Bukayo Saka as the Arsenal winger bids to return from three-month absence ahead of Real Madrid showdown
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has issued an update on Bukayo Saka's injury status, as the Arsenal winger has missed almost three months of action with a hamstring issue.

arts.ttl: Neymar ruled out of Brazil return, Endrick in
arts.sum: Neymar's return to action for Brazil will be delayed yet longer after the forward was ruled out of his country's squad for upcoming World Cup qualifiers on Friday due to a thigh injury.

arts.ttl: Injured Neymar replaced by Endrick in Brazil squad
arts.sum: Brazil call up teenage forward Endrick to replace Neymar for this month's World Cup qualifiers after the Santos attacker picks up a muscle injury.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid str called up to replace Neymar in Brazil squad

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola praises ‘brilliant’ Atlético after UCL elimination at hands of Real Madrid
arts.sum: Manchester City head coach Pep Guardiola has moved to reveal his appreciation for the efforts of Diego Simeone’s Atlético Madrid, en route to being sent packing from the Champions League…

arts.ttl: Barcelona star speaks out on Atlético-Real Madrid penalty drama
arts.sum: Barcelona star Gavi has on Friday provided his take on the midweek drama surrounding the latest edition of the Madrid Derby. Real and Atlético Madrid of course locked horns on…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star Mbappé leading Mo Salah in one stat across Europe’s top-5 leagues
arts.sum: A head-turning statistic, highlighting the influence of Real Madrid star Kylian Mbappé in the final third across the season to date, has on Friday come to the fore online. Frontman…

arts.ttl: Official: Youngsters called up as Real Madrid name squad to face Villarreal
arts.sum: La Liga giants Real Madrid have on Friday unveiled the club’s latest squad of players. This comes ahead of Los Blancos’ return to action tomorrow evening. Fresh off sending city…

arts.ttl: Will Vinicius Junior Play for Real Madrid vs. Villarreal?
arts.sum: Real Madrid's Vinícius Júnior is a doubt to play against Villarreal after the winger missed training ahead of the La Liga clash.

arts.ttl: ‘Very harsh’ – Diego Simeone launches defence of Real Madrid
arts.sum: Spanish champions Real Madrid have this week come in for some kind words on the part of something of a surprise source. The individual in question? Diego Simeone. Tactician Simeone…
